title: LINE group allowlist scope mismatch with DM pairing-store entries
description: The shouldProcessLineEvent function in the LINE bot handler falls back to account.config.allowFrom (which includes DM pairing-store identities) when no explicit groupAllowFrom is configured. This means any user who has paired via DM is implicitly allowed in all LINE groups, bypassing the group allowlist policy intended to restrict group message processing to explicitly authorized senders.
